name: Fresh Strawberry Scones
recipeInstructions:
2. Combine the flour and baking powder.
3. Cut in the reduced-calorie margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Mix the orange juice concentrate and milk together, then stir in the lemon zest.
5. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture, pour in the liquid mixture, and combine using a plastic dough divider or rubber spatula. The dough should form a ball that is sticky but manageable.
6. Knead the dough a few times until it forms a workable ball while retaining some stickiness; you may need to add a tablespoon or two of extra flour.
7. Pat the dough into a circle about 3/4 inch thick, wrap in plastic, and refrigerate for at least one hour.
8. Prepare a baking sheet by sprinkling it generously with flour.
9. Cut the dough down the middle using a dough divider or blunt knife.
10. Place the bottom half of the scone on the baking sheet, evenly distribute the sliced strawberries, and dollop the jam to cover the bottom.
11. Cover with the top half of the scone dough and slightly crimp the edges.
12. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
13. Using a dough divider or blunt knife, cut the dough into 8 equal pie-shaped wedges.
14. Brush the tops with milk or egg whites for a shinier appearance.
15. Bake for 14 minutes or until golden brown. Serve when cooled enough to handle, or store covered and reheat in the toaster oven to crisp.
